full_text:
Cao Xun 曹訓
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Xun (曹訓). Cao Zhen’s third son. Younger brother of Cao Shuang. Executed by Sima Yi. Cao Xun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Xun lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
